segments.text: was not with Me. So it's a very great day for me to see so many Sahaja Yogis here who
are from this country, Greece and first I came into Greece –I told My husband that

But perhaps the people have lost their heritage, but the vibrations are in that atmosphere.
And one day Sahaja Yoga should prosper here very much and somehow we met some bureaucrats
who were Greeks an experience was not good with them
And my husband said that, if you say the Greeks are really religious people then look at these
people what they're doing to Me.
I said there may be bureaucrats and all over bureaucrats

but on whole

they took Me down especially me

so it took Me around
everywhere even the sea I felt was beautiful

years ago and i find now the vibrations are coming
through you people. And whole place is again vibrating

in Greece,You see,Greece and Italy
I mean Turkey both Are very important
First of all, you are the bridge between

Eastern & Western Side

Now ,the greatest danger
That You have now
Is

ancient peoples of ages just like Indians

understand the historical background of your country first.
For Sahaja Yogis
It is really important

About your traditions
Your background and how it is connected

Connected to Mother Mary
Connecting with Christ

Understand the historical background
Of This country

So that You can talk about Sahajyoga
And as it is you know, Athena has the Kundalini in her hand and we can see that clearly she
was Dadishakti.
Actually In Sanskrit language Artha means Primordial so She Was The Primordial Mother because
there were no connection left between Greeks & Indians this translation was not there
and they didn't know what it means by Athena.
But Indians knew that this is the place
for the manifestation of the Adi Shakti,
because in The Devi Mahatma if you read
or You will find out
They have described Greece as the Manipura Dweep
meaning island on the Manipur
Manipure is this Nabhi Chakra
So in the Nabi, there's an island where which is over Greece
Where that goddess resides Manipur Chakra
and
so this Athena has been described. And when I went to
Her temple
i found
That There was a little Temple for The Child God

So now you are the Nabhi, you're sitting here in the Nabhi of

How important is Nabhi?
You know that very well!
That Nabhichakra gets spoiled
and your life becomes miserable for a human being
so on right side as you see
it's a liver
because we had lots of philosophers
they used to think alot
And they created lots of tragedies, you see, Greek tragedies well known where a marriage
system was little bit challenged that there were say two men one woman or maybe
women and man never felt happy with the marriage.
So left Navi was under attack throughout to have such tragedy they wrote so many
I must say, so many dramas and they played them here.
So much plays were there showing that
There are two men or one woman
Or Two women And One man
No relationship between the husband
wife which was pure
That Was The Tragedy
Is known all over as the Greek tragedy
It's All imaginary
People you see became very left sided to begin with
They started thinking, oh this life is a misery.
It's tragedy what should we do?
Why should be try to show that
We are happy and very unhappy people
And all these things started here
To begin with
Then came your Orthodox Church
Now the Orthodox church
Is another one which of course
Really doesn't treat women well
and treats them as if they are all the time unholy.
Certain times,
They cannot go to church
And can not touch people
All kinds of nonsensical ideas that had
That also made women very left sided
Then on top
Of this was happening
With these tragedies
Suddenly
The economic problem came up
and people felt very sort of disgusted about that.
So the left side became
a prominent here,
And I think many of these
left-sided Buddhist organizations started
Many gurus came who made you feel miserable
but worse was done by the Greek church
which makes us so guilty
So you became very left-sided.
Now this Left-Sided Net was later on counterbalanced
by people who started becoming overactive,
thinking too much working to hard and all those things
but still I think that they don't work
as they should work

we can prove everything

this is an absolute truth

love and also lot of understanding about others' feelings.

So in Sahaja Yoga it's very important is the sincerity of purpose.
You must have complete sincerity, a purpose that you are here to achieve your own self-emancipation first

The people all around and the whole world now require help.

does not matter

all do well
We've seen this happening
in so many countries where we had no hope at all.
For example, a country like Russia – imagine!
They never worshipped any God they didn't know about god
and were not allowed to know anything about religion or anything
but suddenly I went there
they recognized me, suddenly
just with my photograph
I find them there, was amazed that the first time I went to Leningrad they were two thousand
seats in a hall.
But outside all standing and I said why are you standing out side?
They say these seats are full Mother!
And this is extra people more than 2000 outside so I said it's too much.
So they asked what about us and I said alright let me finish my program.
Went inside did her program everything happened
And you'll be amazed when we had the program,
The people who were outside where still waiting.
I gave realization to People and they're waiting, waiting, waiting
When i came out ,I said now what do?
I can't give You Realization just Now
So They Said Alright What Can We Do
I said Tomorrow Morning Can You Come
They Said All Right
so all those Who Were Inside
Those Who Where Outside
All of them came and sat down in that open ground
And I gave them Realization.
So this is the first beginning but now,
In Moscow or any place we have to reserve a huge big stadium
14-16 thousand people are there
& realization has been given
But they were so quick to accept Sahaja Yoga
so quick to accept Me, too quick
To understand Sahaja Yoga. I just can't imagine
how these Russians have got this capacity
No question of their going back
no questions about their sincerity being challenged
there is not a question
doubting themselves
Just that and
So much

a lot of idiotical people live here and they were only busy

Tell us The Science Of God
Such open minded People

of freedom
